name: Conference Badge
oneLiner: Custom 3D-printed conference badge with a swappable raised-QR code plate.
writeup: A custom name badge designed in Fusion 360 for conference wear: a 114 × 161 mm framed face with detail banding around the border and a recessed center field.

The QR code is a separate 77.5 mm plate with the code modeled as raised geometry — print it in a contrasting filament and it scans straight off the badge, and the code can be swapped without reprinting the whole thing.

name: Design Spore Mark
oneLiner: The Design Spore mushroom logo as a printable relief.
writeup: The Design Spore mushroom mark translated from line art into solid geometry — a 21 × 24 mm relief, 0.8 mm thick, sized for pins, charms, and embossing onto other prints so the brand can live off the screen.

name: Honeycomb Wall Insert (M4)
oneLiner: Hex inserts for a honeycomb storage wall — M4 hardware mount and blank variants.
writeup: Snap-in hex inserts for a honeycomb storage wall: a 26 mm hexagonal body with spring clips on the sides, in two variants — one with an M4 through-hole for bolting on hooks and holders, and a blank for capping unused cells.
